name: Phase 7 KPI engine and control signals requirements matrix

rows.requirement: KPI definitions, formulas, thresholds, and versioning
evidence: packages/kpi-engine/src/index.ts defines tenant-owned versioned KpiDefinition, KpiFormulaDefinition, and KpiThresholdRuleSet primitives
packages/kpi-engine/src/kpiEngine.test.ts proves KPI/formula/threshold ids, version fields, active status, and source binding contract
packages/kpi-engine/src/kpiEngine.test.ts proves invalid runtime entity/cadence-style inputs are rejected before API wiring can pass unsafe JSON into the domain model
tests: npm test -- packages/kpi-engine exit 0: 1 file, 11 tests passed
npm run test:integration exit 0: 8 files, 39 tests passed
npm test exit 0: 50 files, 310 tests passed after rerun; first run exposed a P4 ProjectWorkControlSurface order-sensitive failure that passed standalone and on full rerun without P7 code changes
npm run typecheck -- --pretty false exit 0
npm run lint exit 0
rows.cleanup: Domain-only deterministic unit tests; no persisted state, API runtime, browser state, or external resources are created.
rows.blocker: Domain evidence exists for P7-001, but the row remains blocked until P7 API/UI/E2E evidence for E2E-060/E2E-063/E2E-064 is implemented.

evidence: packages/kpi-engine/src/index.ts implements a constrained tokenizer/parser/evaluator for arithmetic, parentheses, numeric bindings, and whitelisted math functions only

packages/kpi-engine/src/kpiEngine.test.ts proves deterministic formula trace and rejects unsafe global/property syntax, unknown bindings, missing values, tenant mismatch, and non-finite division results
tests: npm test -- packages/kpi-engine exit 0: 1 file, 11 tests passed
npm run test:integration exit 0: 8 files, 39 tests passed
npm test exit 0: 50 files, 310 tests passed after rerun; first run exposed a P4 ProjectWorkControlSurface order-sensitive failure that passed standalone and on full rerun without P7 code changes
npm run typecheck -- --pretty false exit 0
npm run lint exit 0
rows.cleanup: Formula evaluation is pure in-memory computation; tests create no persisted state and leave no cleanup surface.
rows.blocker: Safe formula unit evidence exists, but the row remains blocked until API/UI/E2E paths prove the evaluator through executable P7 scenarios.

rows.requirement: KPI source bindings and evaluation periods
evidence: packages/kpi-engine/src/index.ts evaluates KPI values from canonical source values with bindingKey/sourceEntity/sourceField/observedAt trace and evaluation period validation
packages/kpi-engine/src/kpiEngine.test.ts proves source trace, formula trace, threshold trace, entity/period output, and cross-tenant rejection before evaluation proceeds
packages/kpi-engine/src/kpiEngine.test.ts proves invalid calendar dates, empty sourceEntityId, and malformed source observedAt are rejected before trace creation
tests: npm test -- packages/kpi-engine exit 0: 1 file, 11 tests passed
npm run test:integration exit 0: 8 files, 39 tests passed
npm test exit 0: 50 files, 310 tests passed after rerun; first run exposed a P4 ProjectWorkControlSurface order-sensitive failure that passed standalone and on full rerun without P7 code changes
npm run typecheck -- --pretty false exit 0
npm run lint exit 0
rows.cleanup: KPI evaluation inputs are immutable in-memory test values; no persisted source records or external fixtures are created.
rows.blocker: Source-binding domain evidence exists, but the row remains blocked until API fixture/readback and E2E-061/E2E-062 evidence exist.

evidence: packages/kpi-engine/src/index.ts maps threshold rules by gt/gte/lt/lte/eq/between conditions and selects strongest matching severity deterministically
packages/kpi-engine/src/kpiEngine.test.ts proves critical, warning, and none threshold outcomes with matched rule/action recommendations and trace
packages/kpi-engine/src/kpiEngine.test.ts proves duplicate threshold rule ids are rejected to avoid ambiguous severity/readback semantics
tests: npm test -- packages/kpi-engine exit 0: 1 file, 11 tests passed
npm run test:integration exit 0: 8 files, 39 tests passed
npm test exit 0: 50 files, 310 tests passed after rerun; first run exposed a P4 ProjectWorkControlSurface order-sensitive failure that passed standalone and on full rerun without P7 code changes
npm run typecheck -- --pretty false exit 0
npm run lint exit 0
rows.cleanup: Threshold mapping is pure in-memory computation; no cleanup required beyond deterministic unit process teardown.
rows.blocker: Threshold domain evidence exists, but the row remains blocked until control-surface/API/E2E severity readback evidence exists.

evidence: packages/kpi-engine/src/index.ts creates traceable KPI control signals from non-none evaluations without executing P8 actions and upserts matching open signals by definition/entity/period
packages/kpi-engine/src/kpiEngine.test.ts proves signal tenant/source/evaluation trace, recommended action keys, not_executed action state, and deduped update semantics
tests: npm test -- packages/kpi-engine exit 0: 1 file, 11 tests passed
npm run test:integration exit 0: 8 files, 39 tests passed
npm test exit 0: 50 files, 310 tests passed after rerun; first run exposed a P4 ProjectWorkControlSurface order-sensitive failure that passed standalone and on full rerun without P7 code changes
npm run typecheck -- --pretty false exit 0
npm run lint exit 0
rows.cleanup: Control-signal tests use in-memory value objects only; P8 action execution is intentionally not invoked.
rows.blocker: ControlSignal domain evidence exists, but the row remains blocked until API/UI/E2E prove signal persistence/readback and permissions.

rows.requirement: KPI API and governed configuration commands
evidence: apps/api/src/phase7Runtime.ts provides deterministic tenant-scoped KPI definitions, source values, evaluations, control signals, non-mutating definition preview, governed create/publish/retire commands, governed evaluation execution, and action execution readback.

apps/api/src/app.ts exposes P7 KPI API routes for definitions, preview/create/publish/retire, evaluation run/readback, deviations/readback, and audit while using backend permissions kpi:read, kpi.config:write, kpi.evaluate:execute, and audit.read.

apps/api/src/phase7KpiApi.test.ts proves deterministic read models, tenant isolation, dry-run preview without mutation, governed config commands with audit/action evidence, evaluation readback, deviation projection, read-only denial, cross-tenant denial without leaked ids, version conflicts, invalid formula rejection, and source-entity precondition rejection without partial mutation.
tests: npm test -- apps/api/src/phase7KpiApi.test.ts exit 0: 1 file, 5 tests passed

npm test exit 0: 51 files, 315 tests passed

npm run lint exit 0
rows.cleanup: P7 API/runtime state is deterministic in-memory per createApiApp instance; denied, invalid, preview-only, and source-entity mismatch paths are tested to leave no audit/action records or created KPI definitions. No browser, persisted database, external service, or generated fixture state is created in this block.
rows.blocker: API/governed-command evidence exists for P7-006, but the row remains blocked until P7 UI and executable E2E-060/E2E-063/E2E-064 prove the same flows through the user control surfaces.
P7 KPI Definition Admin UI has not been implemented; no component/browser evidence exists yet.
P7 KPI Deviation Control surface has not been implemented; no UI/API readback evidence exists yet.
Executable P7 fixtures and Playwright scenarios are planned but not implemented in this contract-only block.

rows.requirement: Phase 7 verification matrix and exit gate
evidence: P7 verifier support and phase contract are introduced by P7-000, but phase exit cannot be verified until P7 implementation and E2E-060..064 pass.
rows.blocker: Strict P7 phase exit remains blocked because P7-001..P7-009 implementation and executable E2E-060..064 do not exist yet.
